title: RedmiCraft
description: This modpack contains client-side optimizations, utilities, QoL and world-generation related packages that are either required or highly suggested when playing on Redmicraft server.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eca5cf32d51eb7935dbc398109b4f319d057d5bb_0.webp)

Play on redmicraft.tcsenpai.com, a Fabric server with:

- Thousands of new structures
- Overhauled world generation
- Claims, minimap, world map
- Overhauled AI
- Much more!

This modpack contains client-side optimizations, utilities, QoL and world-generation related packages that are either required or highly suggested when playing on Redmicraft server.

Note that the modpack also works for offline gaming.

## Community

Join us on Discord: [https://discord.gg/nvarwX2MjV](https://discord.gg/nvarwX2MjV)

## How to play on RedmiCraft
 
1. Download https://modrinth.com/app
2. Open and log in into Modrinth
3. Download and install https://modrinth.com/modpack/redmicraft from the Modrinth app
4. Start your Redmicraft instance
5. In Multiplayer, add a new server: redmicraft.tcsenpai.com
6. Join, enjoy!

***IMPORTANT*** Check your PC performances before taking the steps below.

## Shaders

This modpack does include Iris shaders. We suggest [AstraLex](https://modrinth.com/shader/astralex), [Complementary Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) or [BLS](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) Shaders.

## Resource Packs

We suggest using [Faithful 64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x), [Dramatic Skys](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys), [Round Trees](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/round-trees) and [Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves) for the best experience possible.
